description: A stylized image rendered to resemble a frame from the Halo video-game series, with a heavy motion-blur and chromatic-aberration filter. In the lower portion a four-wheeled all-terrain vehicle drives across a grassy plain carrying two figures, one of whom mans a mounted gun. The background shows a curving ring-shaped structure arcing up into a starry blue sky. Centered white text reads 'DESTROY THE FLOOD' with smaller text below reading 'JOIN.ICE.GOV'.
